body:
## Rationale

Three drummers confirmed **NOT in drummerEvolution.js (17 entries: Lars/Joey/Portnoy/Haake/Brann/Lombardo/Hoglan/Igor/Danny/MattG/Shannon/Mario/PaulM/Vinnie/GeorgeK/Flo/Eloy) and NOT in evolution batches 6–10**:

1. **Art Cruz** (Lamb of God) — Replaced Chris Adler in 2019, officially joining in 2020. The Adler → Cruz succession is a compelling evolution story: heavier, more technical approach, first LoG album with Cruz was "Omens" (2022). Active entity: LoG articles in proposals (#2863, #2909).
2. **Hellhammer** (Mayhem/Dimmu Borgir) — GA4 **top-3 page this week** (11 views/4 users). Active for 35+ years. His evolution covers early raw black metal (De Mysteriis Dom Sathanas, in ai-fix #2878) through polished Dimmu Borgir era. Zero evolution page currently.
3. **Dirk Verbeuren** (Megadeth/Soilwork) — Joined Megadeth in 2016 after 15 years in Soilwork. Dystopia Grammy win followed immediately. The Soilwork → Megadeth arc = distinct "journeyman reaches the top" narrative. Megadeth cluster building with #2908, #2909 in pipeline.

**All 3 confirmed NOT in drummerEvolution.js (17 entries) and NOT in evolution batches 6–10 (#2873/#2883/#2888/#2898/#2911).**

## Impact

- Hellhammer: directly monetizes the GA4 traffic (#3 page). Evolution page = natural follow-on for users already on his profile
- Art Cruz: LoG drum chair succession is an SEO story ("who replaced Chris Adler?") + builds alongside LoG album articles (#2863, #2909)
- Dirk Verbeuren: closes Megadeth "current drummer" content gap; "who is Megadeth's drummer 2024?" LLM hook
- Three distinct narrative arcs: black metal longevity (Hellhammer), slot fill in major band (Cruz, Verbeuren)

## Files to touch

- `/packages/frontend/data/drummerEvolution.js` — add 3 new entries
- `/public/llms/evolution/art-cruz-evolution.md`
- `/public/llms/evolution/hellhammer-evolution.md`
- `/public/llms/evolution/dirk-verbeuren-evolution.md`

## Content template shape

```js
{
  name: 'Hellhammer',
  driverId: 'hellhammer',
  band: 'Mayhem / Dimmu Borgir',
  eras: [
    { era: 'Early Mayhem (1985–2004)', albums: ['De Mysteriis Dom Sathanas', 'Grand Declaration of War'], kitHighlight: 'Pearl Export, raw production' },
    { era: 'Dimmu Borgir era (2007–2010)', albums: ['In Sorte Diaboli', 'Abrahadabra'], kitHighlight: 'Tama Starclassic, polished studio work' },
    { era: 'Mayhem return (2011–present)', albums: ['Esoteric Warfare', 'Daemon'], kitHighlight: 'Sonor, refined black metal technique' },
  ],
}
```

## Quality gate

- ≥350 words per evolution page covering each era, gear changes, playing style evolution
- ≥3 internal links per page (drummer profile, ≥2 album articles)
- FAQPage schema ≥3 Q&A per page
- 3 LLM files at `/public/llms/evolution/[slug].md` ≥200 words each

## Estimated organic uplift

- "Hellhammer drums evolution" / "Art Cruz Lamb of God" / "Dirk Verbeuren Megadeth" = active entity queries
- GA4 data: Hellhammer drives 11 views/4 users already — evolution page = depth engagement opportunity
- drummerEvolution format proven engagement driver; 17 live entries already generating traffic
- GSC query bucket: extends evolution content cluster, feeds "who replaced X" LLM queries

## Verify

1. 3 new entries in drummerEvolution.js
2. Pages render at `/drummer/hellhammer/evolution`, `/drummer/art-cruz/evolution`, `/drummer/dirk-verbeuren/evolution`
3. FAQPage schema validates for each
4. Internal links to profiles and album articles resolve
5. 3 LLM files exist at `/public/llms/evolution/[slug].md`

## Done

All 3 evolution pages live. drummerEvolution.js has 20 entries (up from 17).
title: SEO batch: Drummer Evolution batch 11 — Art Cruz + Hellhammer + Dirk Verbeuren (~3 pages + 3 LLM files)
